name: cardmarket-price-updater
description: Personal browser extension for Cardmarket pricing automation. Use at your own risk.

scripts.package:chrome: npm run build && mkdir -p exports && rm -f exports/cardmarket-price-updater-chrome.zip && cd dist-chrome && bestzip ../exports/cardmarket-price-updater-chrome.zip *
scripts.package:firefox: npm run build:firefox && mkdir -p exports && rm -f exports/cardmarket-price-updater-firefox.xpi && cd dist-firefox && bestzip ../exports/cardmarket-price-updater-firefox.xpi *
